mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns show no statistically significant positive correlation with FEDFUNDS declines.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 6.0 percent, labor market slack suppresses wage growth and corporate profit margins, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in more than 55 percent of instances where UNRATE exceeds 6.0 percent, or the conditional mean return is not significantly negative at the 95 percent confidence level.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and industrial production signals broad-based economic strength that lifts corporate earnings expectations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The joint signal yields a negative or zero Rank IC over any 2-year rolling window, or positive returns occur in fewer than 45 percent of co-expansion episodes.

mechanism_narrative: During periods of rising inflation, increases in the federal funds rate signal effective central bank tightening that stabilizes real yields and supports positive equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Forward returns are negative in more than 60 percent of high-inflation tightening episodes, or the mechanism fails to outperform a buy-and-hold baseline in regime-filtered backtests.

mechanism_narrative: Sharp month-over-month declines in housing starts indicate weakening consumer confidence and reduced construction sector activity, triggering negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns show no significant negative correlation with HOUST declines, or the signal produces positive returns in over 50 percent of contraction months.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in the index of industrial production reflects expanding capacity utilization and higher corporate output, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Rank IC for INDPRO growth remains below 0.01 over any 3-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns are negative in more than 55 percent of expansion months.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating nonfarm payroll employment growth signals strengthening consumer demand and rising corporate revenues, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The signal yields a negative Rank IC over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns are not significantly positive during months with payroll growth exceeding the 12-month moving average.

mechanism_narrative: When real GDP growth decelerates while the federal funds rate remains elevated, corporate profit forecasts are revised downward, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in more than 50 percent of late-cycle slowdown episodes, or the interaction term fails to achieve statistical significance in out-of-sample regression tests.
